The issue is tracked upstream as [CVE-2026-23870](https://github.com/facebook/react/security/advisories/GHSA-rv78-f8rc-xrxh). \n\nA specially crafted HTTP request can be sent to any App Router Server Function endpoint that, when deserialized, may trigger excessive CPU usage.
